result.markdown:
--- title: "Introduction to R (T3)" subtitle: "R basics — syntax, data types, and control structures" author: "Thomas Girke" date: last-modified code-tools: true sidebar: tutorials # activates the Tutorials sidebar defined in _quarto.yml --- ## Overview This tutorial introduces the basic building blocks of R programming. Code chunks below execute at build time; outputs — plots, tables, printed results — are embedded directly in the page. ## Vectors and data types ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} x <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5) species <- c("Arabidopsis", "Human", "Yeast", "Mouse") gc <- c(AT = 0.40, GC = 0.60) gc ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` AT GC 0.4 0.6 ``` ::: ::: ## Interactive tables with DT ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) library(DT) set.seed(42) gene_df <- data.frame( GeneID = paste0("AT", sample(1000:9999, 20)), logFC = round(rnorm(20, sd = 2), 3), pvalue = round(runif(20, 0, 0.05), 4), FDR = round(runif(20, 0, 0.1), 4) ) datatable(gene_df, filter = "top", options = list(pageLength = 5, scrollX = TRUE), caption = "Table 1: Simulated DEG results") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ## Figures ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(ggplot2) gene_df |> mutate(sig = FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) > 1) |> ggplot(aes(logFC, -log10(pvalue), color = sig)) + geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) + scale_color_manual(values = c("grey60", "#e63946"), labels = c("NS", "Sig")) + labs(x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)", color = NULL) + theme_minimal(base_size = 13) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Volcano plot of simulated results](index_files/figure-html/fig-volcano-1.png){#fig-volcano width=672} ::: ::: ## Python interoperability ::: {.callout-tip} ## Freezing expensive computations Add `#| cache: true` to chunks that call slow Bioconductor functions. Results are reused on subsequent builds unless the source changes. ::: ## Session info ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code code-fold="true" code-summary="Show session info"} sessionInfo() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11) Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu Running under: Debian GNU/Linux 12 (bookworm) Matrix products: default BLAS: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/blas/libblas.so.3.11.0 LAPACK: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/lapack/liblapack.so.3.11.0 LAPACK version 3.11.0 locale: [1] LC_CTYPE=en_US.UTF-8 LC_NUMERIC=C LC_TIME=en_US.UTF-8 LC_COLLATE=en_US.UTF-8 LC_MONETARY=en_US.UTF-8 LC_MESSAGES=en_US.UTF-8 LC_PAPER=en_US.UTF-8 LC_NAME=C [9] LC_ADDRESS=C LC_TELEPHONE=C LC_MEASUREMENT=en_US.UTF-8 LC_IDENTIFICATION=C time zone: America/Los_Angeles tzcode source: system (glibc) attached base packages: [1] stats graphics grDevices utils datasets methods base other attached packages: [1] ggplot2_4.0.2 DT_0.34.0 dplyr_1.2.0 loaded via a namespace (and not attached): [1] gtable_0.3.6 jsonlite_2.0.0 compiler_4.5.3 tidyselect_1.2.1 dichromat_2.0-0.1 jquerylib_0.1.4 scales_1.4.0 yaml_2.3.12 fastmap_1.2.0 R6_2.6.1 labeling_0.4.3 [12] generics_0.1.4 knitr_1.51 htmlwidgets_1.6.4 tibble_3.3.1 bslib_0.10.0 pillar_1.11.1 RColorBrewer_1.1-3 rlang_1.1.7 cachem_1.1.0 xfun_0.56 sass_0.4.10 [23] S7_0.2.1 otel_0.2.0 cli_3.6.5 withr_3.0.2 magrittr_2.0.4 crosstalk_1.2.2 digest_0.6.39 grid_4.5.3 lifecycle_1.0.5 vctrs_0.7.1 evaluate_1.0.5 [34] glue_1.8.0 farver_2.1.2 codetools_0.2-20 rmarkdown_2.30 tools_4.5.3 pkgconfig_2.0.3 htmltools_0.5.9 ``` ::: :::
